login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Sign in to your Raggae account
login.ssoError: SSO authentication failed. Please try again.

register.title: Register
register.subtitle: Create a new Raggae account
register.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
register.emailAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists

settings.title: User Settings
settings.description: Manage your account and API keys.

apiKeys.title: AI Provider API Keys
apiKeys.description: Add keys for OpenAI, Gemini, or Anthropic. Only one key per provider can be active at a time.
apiKeys.addDescription: Select a provider then paste your API key.

page.chatDescription: Start a conversation with your documents

chatPage.reindexingMessage: Reindexing in progress ({progress}/{total}). Chat is temporarily disabled.

settings.reindexingWarning: Reindexing in progress ({progress}/{total}). Upload, chat and reindex actions are temporarily blocked.

general.deleteDescription: This action is irreversible and removes project settings, conversations, and documents.
general.deleteDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

publication.noteNotAvailable: Note: the public chat page is not yet available.
publication.unpublishDescription: The project will no longer be accessible publicly.
publication.unpublishDialogDescription: This project will no longer be accessible publicly. You can re-publish it at any time.
publication.publishDescription: Make this project accessible to anyone with the URL. Users will be able to chat with it without signing in.
publication.publishDialogDescription: This project will be accessible to anyone with its public URL. Are you sure you want to make it public?

documentIngestion.description: The project's document library is configured via indexing options.
documentIngestion.empty: No documents yet. Upload your first document in this section.

knowledgeIndexing.title: Knowledge indexing
knowledgeIndexing.parentChildRecommendation: Recommendation: parent-child chunking usually performs better with the `Semantic` strategy.
knowledgeIndexing.parentChildWarning: Parent-child chunking is enabled with a non-`Semantic` strategy. It works, but relevance is often better with `Semantic`.
knowledgeIndexing.reindexDescription: Reindexing recomputes chunks and embeddings for all project documents and can take time.

models.embeddingDescription: Used to convert your documents and user queries into vectors for semantic retrieval. Changing it usually requires reindexing documents.
models.selectEmbeddingFirst: Select OpenAI or Gemini backend first
models.embeddingCredentialsNote: Credentials are available only for OpenAI/Gemini user keys.
models.llmDescription: Used to generate final answers from retrieved context and conversation history. Choose it based on quality, speed, and cost.
models.selectLlmFirst: Select OpenAI, Gemini or Anthropic backend first
models.llmCredentialsNote: Credentials are available only for OpenAI/Gemini/Anthropic user keys.

contextRetrieval.title: Context retrieval
contextRetrieval.description: Configure how chunks are selected before answer generation.
contextRetrieval.topKNote: Default number of chunks retrieved for each user message.
contextRetrieval.minScoreNote: Discard chunks scored below this threshold (between 0.0 and 1.0).

contextAugmentation.title: Context augmentation
contextAugmentation.candidateMultiplierNote: Number of candidates fetched before reranking = top-k * multiplier.

answerGeneration.promptLimit: Limit: 8000 characters. Beyond this, saving will be refused.
answerGeneration.promptNearLimit: You're approaching the limit. Consider shortening the prompt.
answerGeneration.chatHistoryWindowNote: Maximum number of recent conversation messages kept in prompt context.
answerGeneration.chatHistoryMaxCharsNote: Character budget for injected conversation history in the LLM prompt.

form.systemPromptLimit: Limit: 8000 characters. Beyond this, saving will be refused.
form.systemPromptNearLimit: You're approaching the limit. Consider shortening the prompt.
form.knowledgeDescription: Settings below control how documents are prepared before indexing.
form.chunkingDescription: Chunking defines how a document is split before indexing. `Auto` automatically chooses based on text structure.
form.parentChildDescription: Parent-child mode builds large parent chunks (rich context) and smaller child chunks (finer for search). This can improve retrieval relevance on long documents, at the cost of heavier indexing.
form.parentChildRecommendation: Recommendation: parent-child mode generally works better with the `Semantic` chunking strategy.
form.parentChildWarning: Parent-child mode is active with a non-`Semantic` strategy. This works, but relevance is often better with `Semantic`.
form.retrievalDescription: Retrieval settings will be centralized here in a future iteration.
form.answerDescription: Answer generation settings will be centralized here in a future iteration.
form.reindexEnableDescription: Enabling parent-child mode requires reindexing all project documents to create the parent/child hierarchy.
form.reindexDisableDescription: Disabling parent-child mode requires reindexing all project documents to return to standard chunking.
form.reindexDocumentsWarning: Existing documents will not work correctly until they have been reindexed.

list.createDescription: Set a name, URL slug, and optional description.

settings.title: Organization settings
settings.dangerDescription: Delete this organization and all related data.
settings.deleteWarning: This action is irreversible. All organization data will be permanently deleted.

members.title: Members
members.description: Invite, change roles, and remove members from this organization.

credentials.title: AI provider API keys
credentials.description: Add keys for OpenAI, Gemini, or Anthropic. Only one key per provider can be active at a time.
credentials.addDescription: Select a provider then paste your API key.

page.title: Invitations
page.description: Accept pending invitations to join organizations.

panel.disabledDefault: Chat is temporarily disabled for this project.
panel.previewNotAvailable: Preview is not available for this file type.

sidebar.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation?

upload.dragAndDrop: Drag and drop a file here, or click to select

row.previewNotAvailable: Preview is not available for this file type.

row.unableToLoadPreview: Unable to load preview for this document.
